'''Luxan Personal Armaments, Ltd.''' was an ancient [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] weapons manufacturer known for serving the elite of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. They manufactured the [[Penetrator MB-450]] [[Sporting blaster/Legends|sporting blaster]].

==Appearances==
